report_title: Task 3: Escalation Metrics from 3 Moderate Complexity Sessions

sessions.name: S4 - Multi-file Analysis
sessions.reason: Timeout or internal error during multi-file comparison task

sessions.name: S5 - Debugging Investigation
sessions.reason: Early initialization error - no assistant response generated

sessions.name: S6 - Design Discussion
sessions.reason: Successful completion with pure reasoning response

observations: No soft escalation events were triggered in any session
S4 had the most complex processing (21 messages) but failed before escalation could trigger
S6 completed successfully without needing escalation (conceptual reasoning only)
S5 failed before reaching complexity that would trigger escalation

key_findings: No escalation metrics recorded in any of the 3 sessions
2 sessions encountered failures (S4 timeout after 150s, S5 early initialization error)
Most complex session (S4) made 21 messages and 7 tool calls before failing
Pure reasoning task (S6) required 0 tool calls and completed successfully
Escalation mechanism did not activate during any session execution
recommendations: Investigate S4 timeout - 150 seconds for file comparison suggests potential performance issues
Debug S5 initialization error - early failure prevented reasoning task from starting
Monitor escalation system in S4-type workloads where recursion/complexity is expected to trigger soft escalation
Run additional sessions with explicit escalation triggers to validate escalation detection
